name: Gnocchi Oct 92
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook potatoes in their skins until tender.
2. Peel the potatoes once they are cool enough to handle.
3. Dry the peeled potatoes for about 5 minutes in an oven.
4. Pass the potatoes through a ricer, then add butter and mash with a spoon. Season with salt and nutmeg to taste. Let it cool down.
5. Gradually incorporate the flour into the mashed potatoes.
6. Roll out the dough into thin strips, cutting them at 1/2 inch intervals.
7. Shape each strip into gnocchi using the back of a fork.
8. Cook the gnocchi in plenty of boiling water until they float to the surface.
9. Serve with your favorite sauce.
